recommendations.title: Cyberbully
recommendations.overview: A woman tries to help her teenage daughter when she becomes the victim of online bullying.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: Joe Bell
recommendations.overview: The true story of a small town, working class father who embarks on a solo walk across the U.S. to crusade against bullying after his son is tormented in high school for being gay.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.

recommendations.title: Storm Boy
recommendations.overview: Storm Boy lives a lonely life with his reclusive father on a desolate coastline, but when he forms a close bond with a pelican, Mr. Percival, his life takes a new and unexpected turn.

recommendations.title: Flowers in the Attic
recommendations.overview: After the sudden death of their father, four children face cruel treatment from their ruthless grandmother.

recommendations.title: The Pregnancy Pact
recommendations.overview: Inspired by the true story of teenagers at Gloucester High School who agreed to get pregnant at the same time.

recommendations.title: Little Boy
recommendations.overview: An eight-year-old boy is willing to do whatever it takes to end World War II so he can bring his father home. The story reveals the indescribable love a father has for his little boy and the love a son has for his father.

recommendations.title: Racer and the Jailbird
recommendations.overview: When Gino meets racing driver Bénédicte, it's love at first sight. But Gino has a secret. The kind of secret that can endanger their lives.
